song.title: Majesty (Worship His Majesty)
song.lyrics: . A D—G Bm7 A D A Bm7 Majesty, worship His majesty! .D E7 A F#m B7 Bm E7 Unto Jesus be all glory power and praise! . A D—G Bm7 A D A Bm7 Majesty, kingdom authority, . E7 A E7 A D A Flow from His throne unto His own, His anthem raise.|| . Bm E7 A D A So exalt, lift up on high the name of Jesus . Bm7 E7 C#7 A - E7 Magnify, come glorify Christ Jesus the King . A D—G Bm7 A D A Bm7 Majesty, worship His majesty! . A E7 A D A Jesus who died, now glorified, King of all kings!
